name: kafka-ui
title: Kafka UI
description: Inspect Kafka consumer group lag, browse topics, and open Kafka UI dashboards. Powered by the Kafka UI open-source project.
author: nirrosh

commands.name: search-consumer-groups
commands.title: Search Consumer Groups
commands.subtitle: Kafka UI
commands.description: Search consumer groups, inspect lag per topic and partition

commands.name: search-topics
commands.title: Search Topics
commands.subtitle: Kafka UI
commands.description: Search and browse Kafka topics with partition and replication details

commands.name: manage-environments
commands.title: Configuration Manager
commands.subtitle: Kafka UI
commands.description: Add, edit, or remove Kafka UI environments and cluster connections

preferences.name: lagThresholdWarning
preferences.title: Lag Warning Threshold
preferences.description: Consumer lag above this value is highlighted as a warning

preferences.name: lagThresholdCritical
preferences.title: Lag Critical Threshold
preferences.description: Consumer lag above this value is highlighted as critical
